title: batatas cissoides
intro: Batatas cissoides, also known as the climbing batata or climbing potato, is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Batatas cissoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving digestive health.
